benefits.description: slight mood boost on some days after injection

protocol_notes: User injected 10ml per dose using two 5ml syringes into quadriceps before bed. Used 18 gauge blunt filter needle for drawing to avoid glass particles, then switched to 30g 1-inch needle for injection. No PIP or adverse reactions. Sourced from Russian website and previously from Cosmic Nootropics (no longer available in USA). User reported minimal noticeable cognitive effects despite high dose and extended cycle.
